callGraph.callee:
window.TLKVAudit
      .fetchGoldLog(sb, { searchName: name, dateFrom: dateFrom, dateTo: dateTo, limit: 50000 })
      .then

window.TLKVAudit
      .fetchProductLog(sb, { searchName: name, dateFrom: dateFrom, dateTo: dateTo, limit: 50000 })
      .then

window.TLKVAudit.logGold(sb, {
              action: "row_update",
              entity_name: en,
              entity_id: after.id,
              summary: buildGoldRowChangeSummary(entry.before, entry.after),
              payload: { before: entry.before, after: entry.after },
            }).catch

window.TLKVProducts.saveProduct(payload, {
            mode: isEdit ? "edit" : "create",
            existingSlug:
              isEdit && window.TLKVProductFormAdmin && window.TLKVProductFormAdmin.getOriginalSlug
                ? window.TLKVProductFormAdmin.getOriginalSlug()
                : "",
          }).then

fetch(url, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: body,
      keepalive: true,
      cache: "no-store",
    })
      .then

new Intl.DateTimeFormat("en-GB", {
      timeZone: "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh",
      hour: "2-digit",
      minute: "2-digit",
      hour12: false,
      day: "2-digit",
      month: "2-digit",
      year: "numeric",
    }).formatToParts

sb
      .from("news")
      .select(SELECT_LIST, { count: opts.withCount ? "exact" : undefined })
      .eq("status", "published")
      .order("published_at", { ascending: false, nullsFirst: false })
      .range

sb
        .from("news")
        .select(SELECT_LIST)
        .eq("status", "published")
        .eq("featured", true)
        .order("published_at", { ascending: false, nullsFirst: false })
        .limit

sb
        .from("news")
        .select(SELECT_LIST)
        .eq("status", "published")
        .eq("category_id", categoryId)
        .order("published_at", { ascending: false, nullsFirst: false })
        .limit
